mcq.question: What is a microprocessor?
mcq.correct: An integrated circuit containing the CPU
wrong: A device used to store data permanently
A component used to enter data into a system
A unit used to display output to the user

mcq.question: What components are found inside a microprocessor?
What is an integrated circuit?
mcq.correct: A complete circuit on a single chip
wrong: A set of connected wires between components
A program used to control hardware
A system used to transfer data between devices

mcq.question: Why are microprocessors important?
mcq.correct: They allow CPU functions on a single chip
wrong: They are used to store long-term data
They are responsible for rendering images
